name: Crab Fried Rice- Khao Pad Poo
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large skillet and add the oil.
2. Stir-fry the garlic until fragrant, then add the crabmeat and eggs. Cook until the eggs are set.
3. Add the cooked rice and Maggi seasoning. Mix well.
4. Stir in the fish sauce, sugar, and green onion. Continue stir-frying until the mixture is heated through.
5. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining ingredients for the sauce: fish sauce, chopped green Thai peppers, and cilantro.
6. Transfer the rice to serving dishes.
7. Garnish with sliced tomato, cucumber, and cilantro.
8. Serve the sauce on the side.
NOTE: Maggi seasoning is a versatile sauce used in many Asian and Southeast Asian dishes. It can be found in Asian food stores.
